{{Infobox location
| name = Carturus
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

''See also: [[Carturus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Carturus is a frozen ocean planet located within the territory of the [[Free Worlds]]. The world is characterized by a thick layer of ice covering its waters and is inhabited by a [[World Spirit]] that protects all riches found there. Because of this, the Advocates have established an agreement with the spirit: they provide periodic offerings of treasure in exchange for the safe keeping of their prisoners. The [[Advocates]] maintain a presence on the planet's surface, which includes fish hatcheries and several [[Aethertech]] laboratories. The planet is also a site of significant conflict, as evidenced by an event known as the Carturus incident that left an individual in near-fatal condition.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Carturus is a frozen ocean planet characterized by a thick layer of ice and serves as a prison for the Advocates. After [[Doctor Nova]] was taken to this world, it became a primary destination on the flight path for the crew of [[The Last Horizon]]. As the ship traveled toward the system, the team worked to determine if they had reached teleporter range of the distant location. Although the lightning rabbit is not native to this environment, a battle involving [[Starhammer]] eventually took place on the planet's surface.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Carturus]] is a frozen ocean planet with a layer of thick ice.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Doctor Nova]] was taken to [[Carturus]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Carturus]] is a frozen world where the Advocates keep their prisoners.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Carturus]] is a system that [[The Last Horizon]] is traveling toward.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Carturus]] is a location that the characters are not yet close to.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The crew is attempting to determine if they are in teleporter range of [[Carturus]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Carturus]] is a destination for the team's flight path.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The lightning rabbit is not native to [[Carturus]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c14">''The Engineer'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A battle occurred on [[Carturus]] involving [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“...are we in teleporter range of Carturus?”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
